race.comment: BRAVE XENA (17) comes straight to town at her third race start after giving them a galloping lesson again over 1100m at Nowra in fast time. Massive class rise but must be respected with Fitzgerald's claim from the good gate. SATIN STILETTO (2) tough mare proven at this level who gets a much better setup for this. Worked hard from the outside gate with a tenacious seventh over 1200m at this track. Will handle the drop in distance and take catching with Bourke's 2kg claim. Go close. TOUGH GUY (6) underrated gelding who produced good figures first-up with a fast-finishing victory over 1000m at Tamworth in BM66 class. All three wins have come at this trip and adept in all conditions. Each way. SILVER SERENADE (18) improving filly with the upside to take this out on the limit weight. Good effort two-back when fourth in BM72 company over 1100m at Rosehill. Key jockey change and goes into the exotics. ISHIKARI (16) holding form and comes here in peak condition with no weight. Respect.
